criteria_verification.criterion_text: `src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py` — the FEAT-JARVIS-002 DDR-005/C2 reserved slot — gains `escalate_to_frontier(instruction: str, target: FrontierTarget = FrontierTarget.GEMINI_3_1_PRO) -> str` decorated with `@tool(parse_docstring=True)`.
criteria_verification.evidence: Added @tool(parse_docstring=True) escalate_to_frontier(instruction, target=FrontierTarget.GEMINI_3_1_PRO) -> str at the bottom of src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py and exported via __all__. Verified by TestToolDecoration (3 tests: BaseTool instance, name, args schema includes instruction + target).
criteria_verification.notes: Added @tool(parse_docstring=True) escalate_to_frontier(instruction, target=FrontierTarget.GEMINI_3_1_PRO) -> str at the bottom of src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py and exported via __all__. Verified by TestToolDecoration (3 tests: BaseTool instance, name, args schema includes instruction + target).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Docstring (the contract per DDR-005 precedent) states verbatim: "ATTENDED-ONLY — cloud escape hatch. Never invoke from ambient, learning, or async-subagent contexts."
criteria_verification.evidence: First line of escalate_to_frontier.__doc__ is the verbatim string (backslash-newline continuation in the source preserves the single-line content). Verified by TestDocstringContract.test_docstring_contains_required_attended_only_text and test_description_carries_required_attended_only_text.
criteria_verification.notes: First line of escalate_to_frontier.__doc__ is the verbatim string (backslash-newline continuation in the source preserves the single-line content). Verified by TestDocstringContract.test_docstring_contains_required_attended_only_text and test_description_carries_required_attended_only_text.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `target=GEMINI_3_1_PRO` invokes `google_genai:gemini-3.1-pro` via the `google-genai` SDK; `target=OPUS_4_7` invokes `anthropic:claude-opus-4-7` via the `anthropic` SDK.
criteria_verification.evidence: _escalate_gemini calls google.genai.Client(api_key=...).models.generate_content(model='gemini-3.1-pro', contents=instruction); _escalate_opus calls anthropic.Anthropic(api_key=...).messages.create(model='claude-opus-4-7', ...). Verified by TestHappyPath.test_gemini_happy_path_calls_correct_model and test_opus_happy_path_calls_correct_model (assert kwargs['model'] equals the documented alias).
criteria_verification.notes: _escalate_gemini calls google.genai.Client(api_key=...).models.generate_content(model='gemini-3.1-pro', contents=instruction); _escalate_opus calls anthropic.Anthropic(api_key=...).messages.create(model='claude-opus-4-7', ...). Verified by TestHappyPath.test_gemini_happy_path_calls_correct_model and test_opus_happy_path_calls_correct_model (assert kwargs['model'] equals the documented alias).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Out-of-enum `target` is rejected at `@tool(parse_docstring=True)` argument coercion before the function body runs (ASSUM-005, confirmed) — no provider contacted.
criteria_verification.evidence: Pydantic schema synthesised from FrontierTarget type hint by langchain's @tool wrapper raises pydantic.ValidationError on a literal 'NOT_A_VALID_TARGET'. Verified by TestTargetCoercion.test_invalid_target_does_not_contact_any_provider — patches both google.genai.Client and anthropic.Anthropic and asserts neither was called.
criteria_verification.notes: Pydantic schema synthesised from FrontierTarget type hint by langchain's @tool wrapper raises pydantic.ValidationError on a literal 'NOT_A_VALID_TARGET'. Verified by TestTargetCoercion.test_invalid_target_does_not_contact_any_provider — patches both google.genai.Client and anthropic.Anthropic and asserts neither was called.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Missing `GOOGLE_API_KEY` when called with Gemini target returns `"ERROR: config_missing — GOOGLE_API_KEY not set"`; missing `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` when called with Opus target returns `"ERROR: config_missing — ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set"`. No outbound request made in either case.
criteria_verification.evidence: Both branches read os.environ at entry, return the exact documented ERROR strings on missing keys, and short-circuit before importing the SDK module. Verified by TestConfigMissingGemini (3 tests) and TestConfigMissingAnthropic (3 tests) — including assertions that the patched provider Client was never called.
criteria_verification.notes: Both branches read os.environ at entry, return the exact documented ERROR strings on missing keys, and short-circuit before importing the SDK module. Verified by TestConfigMissingGemini (3 tests) and TestConfigMissingAnthropic (3 tests) — including assertions that the patched provider Client was never called.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Unreachable provider returns `"DEGRADED: provider_unavailable — <short reason>"`; no exception propagates.
criteria_verification.evidence: Both branches wrap the SDK call in try/except Exception (boundary guard per ADR-ARCH-021) and return f'DEGRADED: provider_unavailable — {type(exc).__name__}'. The exception class name is the <short reason> — chosen because it can never contain caller input. Verified by TestProviderUnavailable (3 tests covering Gemini ConnectionError, Opus ConnectionError, and a single-INFO-log assertion).
criteria_verification.notes: Both branches wrap the SDK call in try/except Exception (boundary guard per ADR-ARCH-021) and return f'DEGRADED: provider_unavailable — {type(exc).__name__}'. The exception class name is the <short reason> — chosen because it can never contain caller input. Verified by TestProviderUnavailable (3 tests covering Gemini ConnectionError, Opus ConnectionError, and a single-INFO-log assertion).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Empty body from provider maps to `"DEGRADED: provider_unavailable — empty response"` (ASSUM-001, confirmed).
criteria_verification.evidence: After successful SDK call, both branches normalise text via getattr(response, 'text', None) or '' (Gemini) and getattr(response.content[0], 'text', None) or '' guarded by len(content) (Opus). Empty/missing text routes to the documented DEGRADED string. Verified by TestDegradedEmpty (3 tests: Gemini empty text, Opus empty text, Opus empty content list).
criteria_verification.notes: After successful SDK call, both branches normalise text via getattr(response, 'text', None) or '' (Gemini) and getattr(response.content[0], 'text', None) or '' guarded by len(content) (Opus). Empty/missing text routes to the documented DEGRADED string. Verified by TestDegradedEmpty (3 tests: Gemini empty text, Opus empty text, Opus empty content list).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Happy path returns the provider's response text as a `str` — not the raw SDK response object.
criteria_verification.evidence: Both branches return the extracted .text attribute (a Python str) directly. Verified by TestHappyPath.test_gemini_happy_path_returns_response_text and test_opus_happy_path_returns_response_text (assert result == 'Hello from Gemini' / 'Hello from Opus' — string equality, not object equality).
criteria_verification.notes: Both branches return the extracted .text attribute (a Python str) directly. Verified by TestHappyPath.test_gemini_happy_path_returns_response_text and test_opus_happy_path_returns_response_text (assert result == 'Hello from Gemini' / 'Hello from Opus' — string equality, not object equality).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Every successful OR degraded call emits exactly one structured INFO log via `log_frontier_escalation(ctx, logger)` with `model_alias="cloud-frontier"` (budget trace per ADR-ARCH-030). `outcome` field set to `"success"`, `"config_missing"`, `"provider_unavailable"`, or `"degraded_empty"`.
criteria_verification.evidence: Centralised _emit_frontier_log helper constructs FrontierEscalationContext and calls log_frontier_escalation(ctx, logger) at every terminal branch — by construction, each call to escalate_to_frontier emits exactly one INFO record. Verified by TestStructuredLog.test_success_emits_exactly_one_info_record (asserts len(records) == 1 with model_alias='cloud-frontier' and outcome='success'), plus the per-outcome assertions in TestConfigMissingGemini, TestConfigMissingAnthropic, TestProviderUnavailable, and TestDegradedEmpty.
criteria_verification.notes: Centralised _emit_frontier_log helper constructs FrontierEscalationContext and calls log_frontier_escalation(ctx, logger) at every terminal branch — by construction, each call to escalate_to_frontier emits exactly one INFO record. Verified by TestStructuredLog.test_success_emits_exactly_one_info_record (asserts len(records) == 1 with model_alias='cloud-frontier' and outcome='success'), plus the per-outcome assertions in TestConfigMissingGemini, TestConfigMissingAnthropic, TestProviderUnavailable, and TestDegradedEmpty.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Instruction body is never logged nor echoed in any error/degraded return string** (ASSUM-006, confirmed; concern #6 in the review report).
criteria_verification.evidence: FrontierEscalationContext records only instruction_length (per the existing TASK-J003-004 redaction posture); the DEGRADED reason uses type(exc).__name__ which cannot contain user input; and the config_missing / degraded_empty strings are constants. Verified by TestStructuredLog.test_log_does_not_carry_instruction_body (uses a unique secret token and asserts it never appears in any record's banned attributes or formatted message), plus the secret-string-not-in-result assertions in TestConfigMissingGemini, TestConfigMissingAnthropic, and TestProviderUnavailable.
criteria_verification.notes: FrontierEscalationContext records only instruction_length (per the existing TASK-J003-004 redaction posture); the DEGRADED reason uses type(exc).__name__ which cannot contain user input; and the config_missing / degraded_empty strings are constants. Verified by TestStructuredLog.test_log_does_not_carry_instruction_body (uses a unique secret token and asserts it never appears in any record's banned attributes or formatted message), plus the secret-string-not-in-result assertions in TestConfigMissingGemini, TestConfigMissingAnthropic, and TestProviderUnavailable.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Never raises — all error paths produce a structured string per ADR-ARCH-021.
criteria_verification.evidence: Boundary-guard pattern: every SDK call sits inside try/except Exception with an early-return error string. The dispatch path itself has no other unguarded raise points. Verified by TestNeverRaises.test_runtime_error_inside_provider_call_is_caught and test_value_error_inside_opus_call_is_caught — both inject exceptions inside the SDK call and assert the function returns a DEGRADED string instead of propagating.
criteria_verification.notes: Boundary-guard pattern: every SDK call sits inside try/except Exception with an early-return error string. The dispatch path itself has no other unguarded raise points. Verified by TestNeverRaises.test_runtime_error_inside_provider_call_is_caught and test_value_error_inside_opus_call_is_caught — both inject exceptions inside the SDK call and assert the function returns a DEGRADED string instead of propagating.

issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `the stack-specific Phase-3 specialist` (Implementation)
No seam tests detected for cross-boundary feature. Consider adding seam/contract/boundary tests to validate technology boundary interactions. This is a recommendation, not a blocking gate.
BDD oracle: 5 scenario(s) reference step definitions that are not yet implemented. These do NOT block approval but should be implemented to make the scenarios runnable.
pending_examples: test_an_attended_session_can_escalate_to_the_default_frontier_model — implement: All traceback entries are hidden. Pass `--full-trace` to see hidden and internal frames.
test_escalating_to_gemini_without_a_configured_google_api_key_returns_a_configuration_error — implement: All traceback entries are hidden. Pass `--full-trace` to see hidden and internal frames.
test_escalating_to_opus_without_a_configured_anthropic_api_key_returns_a_configuration_error — implement: All traceback entries are hidden. Pass `--full-trace` to see hidden and internal frames.
test_frontier_provider_unavailability_returns_a_degraded_result_without_raising — implement: All traceback entries are hidden. Pass `--full-trace` to see hidden and internal frames.
test_an_empty_frontier_response_is_reported_as_a_degraded_outcome — implement: All traceback entries are hidden. Pass `--full-trace` to see hidden and internal frames.

rationale: All quality gates passed. Independent tests failed due to high-confidence infrastructure dependency (Docker unavailable). Task declares required infrastructure. Conditionally approved — independent tests skipped. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 1181 chars provided.
